ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "u10" REAL /* Eastward wind component (m/s) */,
  "v10" REAL /* Northward wind component (m/s) */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation (mm) */,
  "surface_pressure" REAL /* Surface pressure (Pa) */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Evaporation (mm) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data collection point */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating data quality */,
  "data_quality_message" TEXT /* Message describing the data quality issue (if any) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., weather station, radar, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper air) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the data format (e.g., .csv, .nc) */,
  "is_compressed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the data is compressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., weather station, radar, satellite) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL where the data can be accessed */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the predictive model */,
  "model_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data point */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecast value */,
  "forecast_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the forecast location */,
  "forecast_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the forecast location */,
  "forecast_altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the forecast location */,
  "forecast_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the climate model (e.g., CMIP5, CMIP6) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the climate model */,
  "model_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
